Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looking at the traces Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC Common patterns 1 All cases start with RA 2 Then VF 3 Then AE 4 After AE there is either Directly to AD Case 2 Or enter a loop involving RMI and possibly repeating VF Cases 1 and 3

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So after AE we might have a loop where we can Exit to AD OR Do RMI then VF then loop back

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait looking more carefully In Case 1 AE RMI VF AD In Case 3 AE RMI RMI VF AD

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Let me reconsider the loop structure

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The operator A B means execute A then either exit or execute B and then A again

Name: Validation - PE
Text: If I model the part after AE as AD RMI VF No that does not look right

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The pattern after AE seems to be Zero or more times RMI and then eventually VF and then AD

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the structure after AE could be zero or more RMIs then VF then AD

Name: Validation - PE
Text: But in Case 2 we have no RMI and no second VF We just have AD

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the pattern is After AE we either go to AD directly Case 2 OR We enter a cycle of request missing info and re validate and then go to AD

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The process is a sequence RA VF AE approval preparation phase AD SC AC The approval preparation phase is Either skip tau Or do one or more RMIs followed by VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This is exactly X tau sequence of one or more RMI then VF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For Case 2 AE tau AD gives AE AD good For Case 1 AE RMI VF AD good For Case 3 AE RMI RMI VF AD good

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the full tree is sequence RA VF AE X tau sequence loop RMI tau then VF AD SC AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: There is no concurrency needed The only variation is whether to enter the missing info loop or not and how many times to request missing info
